    # via sqlalchemy
urllib3==2.6.3 \
    --hash=sha256:1b62b6884944a57dbe321509ab94fd4d3b307075e0c2eae991ac71ee15ad38ed \
    --hash=sha256:bf272323e553dfb2e87d9bfd225ca7b0f467b919d7bbd355436d3fd37cb0acd4
    # via requests

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# pysqlcipher3 — NOT available on PyPI with a universal wheel.
# Requires libsqlcipher on the OS before building from source:
#   macOS:         brew install sqlcipher
#   Ubuntu/Debian: apt-get install libsqlcipher-dev
# Then: pip install pysqlcipher3  (or build from https://github.com/rigglemania/pysqlcipher3)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
